title: doryopteris australiae
intro: Doryopteris australiae, also known as the Australian tree fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cyathea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, and is also thought to have antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Doryopteris australiae is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
